# bitbucketdc_repository (Data Source)

Reads an existing Bitbucket Data Center repository by project key and slug.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_key` (String) The key of the project that owns the repository.
- `slug` (String) The repository slug (URL-friendly name).

### Read-Only

- `clone_url_http` (String) The HTTP clone URL.
- `clone_url_ssh` (String) The SSH clone URL.
- `default_branch` (String) The default branch of the repository.
- `description` (String) The repository description.
- `forkable` (Boolean) Whether the repository allows forking.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier in the format {project_key}/{slug}.
- `name` (String) The display name of the repository.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether the repository is publicly accessible.
- `state` (String) The repository state (e.g. AVAILABLE).
